recommendations.title: The Diamond Arm
recommendations.overview: A diamond smuggling operation goes wrong when an ordinary Soviet citizen becomes unwittingly involved, and the criminals are forced to court him to retrieve their diamonds.

recommendations.title: Ivan Vasilyevich Changes His Profession
recommendations.overview: A scientist builds a time machine and accidentally sends his apartment complex manager and a petty burglar to 16th century Moscow, while Tsar Ivan the Terrible travels to 1973.

recommendations.title: Bootleggers

recommendations.title: Fantozzi: White Collar Blues
recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.

recommendations.title: Ivan's Childhood
recommendations.overview: In WW2, twelve year old Soviet orphan Ivan Bondarev works for the Soviet army as a scout behind the German lines and strikes a friendship with three sympathetic Soviet officers.

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: War between two Irish youth gangs consists of removing and retrieving buttons from each other's clothing.

recommendations.title: O Lucky Man!
recommendations.overview: An ambitious coffee salesman has a series of improbable and ironic adventures seemingly designed to challenge his naive idealism.

recommendations.title: The Second Tragic Fantozzi
recommendations.overview: The frustrating adventures of a humble employee who all the time has to fullfill the wishes and desires of his bosses.
